comments.body: Version bump (0.7.0) pushed to Gerrit as change 315 (Change-Id I6f48545). Awaiting LLM-Review + Verified before submit + tag.

comments.author: Joe Oakhart
comments.body:
Release v0.7.0 channel status:
- pyproject.toml + server.json 0.7.0: MERGED (change 315). ✓
- PyPI: 0.7.0 live. ✓
- GitHub Release: v0.7.0 exists + marked Latest, artifacts attached. NOTE: created MANUALLY (one-off) — the auto github_release job FAILED on the v0.7.0 tag (gh had no repo context; run 28763401143). Dogfood found the bug; fix (GH_REPO) merged as change 316 (bug 8ed5, closed). The AC 'created automatically by the workflow' was NOT met for v0.7.0 specifically — it WILL be met on the next tag release (v0.7.1+) via the merged fix.
- Homebrew tap: Formula/rebar.rb bumped to 0.7.0 (url+sha256), pushed to navapbc/homebrew-rebar. ✓
- Smoke test: published 0.7.0 passes end-to-end (init/create/claim/comment/close/fsck + rebar-mcp). Full probe blocked only by no-TTY auto-init in the bg shell (not a 0.7.0 defect). ✓
- MCP Registry: BLOCKED — publisher token expired; needs interactive `mcp-publisher login github` (browser/device auth) which cannot run headlessly. Awaiting operator login, then `mcp-publisher publish` of server.json (0.7.0).

Ticket stays in_progress until MCP Registry is published.

comments.author: Joe Oakhart
comments.body: MCP Registry: PUBLISHED. io.github.navapbc/rebar version 0.7.0 is live and marked isLatest:true on registry.modelcontextprotocol.io (verified via /v0/servers search). All channels now at 0.7.0: PyPI ✓, GitHub Release (Latest) ✓, Homebrew ✓, MCP Registry ✓. Smoke test ✓. The only AC not literally met is 'GitHub Release created automatically' — v0.7.0's was manual (one-off) because the auto job had a bug (fixed in change 316); the next tag release exercises the fixed auto path.

comments.author: Joe Oakhart
comments.body: FORCE_CLOSE: close gate(s) bypassed by user approval — no completion/signature attestation was signed. Reason: "v0.7.0 fully released across all four surfaces (PyPI 0.7.0, GitHub Release v0.7.0 Latest, Homebrew formula, MCP Registry 0.7.0 isLatest); smoke test passed. Force-closing because AC3 ('GitHub Release created automatically, not by hand') is not retroactively satisfiable: the dogfood surfaced a bug in the new github_release job (missing GH_REPO), so v0.7.0's release was created manually as a one-off (PyPI immutability blocks re-running the tag workflow). The fix merged as change 316 and will auto-create the release on the next tag (v0.7.1+). Left unsigned to accurately reflect that this one criterion was bypassed.". Session: f9e721e55.

compiled_state.description:
## What
Cut the **v0.7.0** minor release of `nava-rebar` following `docs/releasing.md`, and
in doing so **dogfood** the newly-merged `github_release` job (ticket
f112-6222-e236-4b09, change 314): pushing the `v0.7.0` tag must now *automatically*
create the GitHub Release — no manual `gh release create`. 198 commits have landed
since v0.6.0 (grounding pyright backend, typed public return contracts, MCP tool
annotations, supply-chain hardening, plus many fixes/docs), so a minor bump is warranted.

## Scope / steps (per docs/releasing.md)
- Bump `pyproject.toml` `version` and `server.json` (`version` + `packages[0].version`) to 0.7.0.
- Land the "Release 0.7.0" bump commit on `main` through Gerrit (both votes).
- Tag `v0.7.0` and push the tag → `release.yml` publishes to PyPI (OIDC) and the new
  `github_release` job auto-creates the GitHub Release.
- Update the Homebrew tap (`navapbc/homebrew-rebar` `Formula/rebar.rb`: url + sha256).
- Update the MCP Registry (`mcp-publisher publish` of `server.json`).
- Post-release smoke test (`scripts/probe-rebar.sh` against the published artifact).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `pyproject.toml` and `server.json` both read version 0.7.0 and the bump is merged to main via Gerrit.
- [ ] PyPI shows nava-rebar 0.7.0 live.
- [ ] The GitHub Release for v0.7.0 was created **automatically** by the workflow (not by hand) and is marked Latest.
- [ ] Homebrew formula points at the 0.7.0 sdist (correct url + sha256).
- [ ] MCP Registry serves io.github.navapbc/rebar at 0.7.0.
- [ ] Post-release probe passes against the published artifact.
compiled_state.title: Release nava-rebar 0.7.0 across all channels (dogfood auto GitHub Release)
